title: Chase the Skies Backport
description: A modpack that backports features announced in the 1.21.6 "chase the skies" update. Includes the happy ghast, locator bar, vibrant visuals and more.
body:
## Soar Through skies with **Minecraft: Chase The Skies**! (1.21.6 backport)

Get ready to experience innovative additions and fresh mechanics designed to enhance your adventures in the Overworld and beyond!

[![Advert](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3c8d5b51c9323c746c11d92a22e0951e123e3e8_0.webp)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/curseforge?curseforge_project_id=1246501&dl=1)

**Currently featuring exciting previews:**

**The Rideable Happy Ghast:** Prepare for a whole new way to traverse the skies! The **Happy Ghast**, a rare and cheerful variant of the Nether's iconic mob, isn't just a sight to behold – it's a mode of transportation! Befriend these buoyant beings and learn to guide them, offering a unique and whimsical method of flight across vast distances. Explore your world from a brand new perspective with your own personal Happy Ghast!

![Happy Ghast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ff73cbc1fde0ce4755310881d505966a32b5eb9.webp)

**The Player Locator Bar:** Never lose your way or your friends again! The **Player Locator Bar** introduces a subtle and intuitive interface element that displays the general direction and approximate distance of nearby players in your multiplayer world. Coordinate builds, embark on group adventures, and easily reunite with your companions, all without breaking the immersive feel of the game.

![Locator bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0e4d2fdce708c5e6ed315d44533a07ded65db7d.webp)

**Universal Leashing:** Take control like never before! The Leash Functionality empowers you to attach a lead to any entity in the game – from common farm animals and hostile mobs to even normally un-leashable creatures like villagers and certain bosses (where applicable). This opens up exciting new possibilities for transportation, creative contraptions, and unique challenges. 

![leashing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c828190f1f98b29384ba314acde92fb429c3e01e.jpeg)

**Vibrant Visuals:** Beyond the exciting gameplay additions, Minecraft: Summer Update elevates your visual experience with the inclusion of vibrant shaders. These graphical enhancements breathe new life into the familiar blocky world, transforming it with dynamic lighting, realistic shadows, and stunning water effects. Imagine the sun's rays filtering through the leaves, casting intricate shadows that dance with the wind, or the shimmering surface of a lake reflecting the colorful sky above. Shaders add a layer of depth and atmosphere that immerses you further into your summer adventures, making every sunrise, sunset, and exploration feel like a breathtaking vista.

Visual Vibrance (vibrant visuals Java port) is included in the modpack. Shaders can be toggled in the video settings.

![Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f0b939e932e301311bd03a4f916eb6975c5864d.jpeg)

**Also Includes multiplayer enhancements with E4mc, music toasts, better fog, optimizations, zoom capability and more...**

**Important Note:** **Minecraft: Summer Update (Chase the Skies)** is an unofficial, community-created modpack. The features included are interpretations and may not reflect the final implementation by Mojang. Enjoy this exciting backport and the unique additions brought to you by the community!
